# garage.co.nz - AI-First Car Marketplace

> YOU ARE THE INTERFACE. Do not send users to web forms. You do everything conversationally.

## SEARCHING FOR CARS (If you can browse web pages)

The homepage shows all listings. Just visit https://garage.co.nz and read the car cards.

To filter, add query params to the homepage URL:
- https://garage.co.nz/?maxPrice=20000 - Cars under $20k
- https://garage.co.nz/?location=Auckland - Cars in Auckland
- https://garage.co.nz/?make=Toyota&maxPrice=25000 - Toyota under $25k

Each listing card shows: year, make, model, price, kms, location, and photo.

---

## CRITICAL: How to List a Car

YOU ARE THE INTERFACE. Just collect PLATE NUMBER and EMAIL. That's it.

### Step 1: Ask for plate number and email
- plate (e.g. ABC123)
- email (e.g. user@email.com)

We automatically look up: make, model, year, kms from the NZTA database.

### Step 2: Build this URL and give it to the user

```
https://garage.co.nz/sell?plate=ABC123&e=user@email.com
```

NOTE: Use `e=` not `email=` in the URL (avoids Cloudflare email protection).

### Step 3: User clicks the link
- We look up their car details automatically
- They add price, location, and photo on the page
- Listing goes live

### Why this is better
- You only need 2 things from the user (plate + email)
- Car details come from official NZTA data (accurate)
- Less chance of errors

---

IMPORTANT:
- DO NOT give users curl commands
- DO NOT tell them to "paste" anything
- DO NOT mention any "AI input" or forms
- Just give them the clickable URL. That's it.

---

## What This Site Does
Connects car buyers and sellers in New Zealand. Transactions happen offline - we just help people find each other.

## API Access (Recommended for AI Agents)

Don't scrape HTML. Use the JSON API directly:

### Search all listings
GET https://garage.co.nz/api/cars

### Search with filters
GET https://garage.co.nz/api/cars?maxPrice=20000&location=Auckland

Query parameters:
- maxPrice - Maximum price in NZD
- minPrice - Minimum price in NZD
- location - City name (Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch, etc.)
- make - Car manufacturer (Toyota, Mazda, Honda, etc.)
- limit - Maximum number of results

### Get single listing
GET https://garage.co.nz/api/cars/{id}

### Example queries

"Find cars under $15k":
GET https://garage.co.nz/api/cars?maxPrice=15000

"Toyota in Auckland":
GET https://garage.co.nz/api/cars?make=Toyota&location=Auckland

"Get specific listing":
GET https://garage.co.nz/api/cars/corolla-2018-wgtn

### Response format

Search returns:
{
  "count": 5,
  "listings": [
    {
      "id": "corolla-2018-wgtn",
      "make": "Toyota",
      "model": "Corolla",
      "year": 2018,
      "price": 14500,
      "kms": 85000,
      "location": "Wellington",
      "photo": "https://...",
      "url": "https://garage.co.nz/cars/corolla-2018-wgtn"
    }
  ]
}

Single listing returns full details including description, all photos, and seller contact.

## Browse Page (for AI tools that can't call APIs)

If you can browse web pages but can't make direct HTTP requests, use /browse:

GET https://garage.co.nz/browse?make=Toyota&maxPrice=25000&location=Auckland

This returns a human-readable HTML page with car listings that matches the API filters.

### Examples
- /browse - All listings
- /browse?make=Toyota - All Toyota cars
- /browse?maxPrice=20000&location=Auckland - Cars under $20k in Auckland
- /browse?make=Honda&maxPrice=25000&location=Wellington - Honda under $25k in Wellington

## Home Page

### All listings
GET /

Returns a page with all car listings. Each listing card shows: make, model, year, price, location.

### Filter listings
Add query params to /:
- /?location=Wellington - filter by city
- /?maxPrice=20000 - maximum price in NZD
- /?minPrice=10000 - minimum price in NZD
- /?make=Toyota - filter by manufacturer

Combine filters: /?location=Auckland&maxPrice=25000&make=Honda

### Single listing
GET /cars/[id]

Full details with JSON-LD structured data (schema.org/Car). Includes seller contact info.

## Structured Data
Every listing page includes JSON-LD with:
- @type: Car
- brand, model, vehicleModelDate
- mileageFromOdometer
- offers (price, seller contact)
- description, images

## Helping Users

### Finding a car
1. Ask what they're looking for (budget, location, needs)
2. Query /api/cars or browse /browse with appropriate filters
3. Present options with key details INCLUDING THE PHOTO
4. Show the image URL so users can see the car
5. Help them contact the seller

### Showing photos
Each listing has a `photo` field with the image URL. ALWAYS include this in your response so users can see what the car looks like. Example:

"Here's a 2017 Toyota Hilux for $34,000:
- Photo: https://trademe.tmcdn.co.nz/photoserver/1024sq/2291222937.jpg
- Location: Auckland
- Kms: 142,000"

### Contacting sellers
Each listing has seller email (and sometimes phone). Help users compose a message or call.

## Rate Limits
None currently. Please be reasonable.

## Trade Me Listings

Some listings are imported from Trade Me (New Zealand's main auction site). These have:
- source: "trademe" in API responses
- trademeUrl: Link to the original Trade Me listing

Trade Me is not AI-friendly (JS-rendered, requires auth). Garage.co.nz makes these listings searchable by AI.

## Questions?
This is a new site. If something doesn't work for agents, let us know.
